title: 【極醜惡】Facebook禁止Biden家族貪污醜聞散波

replies.msg:
Facebook makes editorial decision to limit distribution of story claiming to show ‘smoking gun’ emails related to Biden and his son

Facebook said Wednesday it decided to limit the distribution of a New York Post story that claims to show “smoking gun” emails related to Democratic presidential nominee Joe Biden and his son.

The editorial decision to reduce the spread of the story, which provides minimal evidence, is a significant one for Facebook.

The social media company has long professed to stand for freedom of speech and rejected the idea that it be an arbiter of truth.

https://www.cnbc.com/2020/10/14/facebook-makes-editorial-decision-to-limit-nypost-biden-story.html

https://nypost.com/2020/10/14/email-reveals-how-hunter-biden-introduced-ukrainian-biz-man-to-dad/

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6PBuswEKj3Y
仲醜惡過weibo
